description_long: This rifle features a futuristic, angular design with a predominantly teal and dark gray color scheme accented by yellow highlights. The stock is skeletonized, providing a lightweight yet sturdy rear section, and the grip is integrated into the lower receiver with a textured appearance for secure handling. The barrel is long and straight, extending from a robust fore-end, and is capped with a small, dark muzzle device. A compact scope or sighting system is mounted on the top rail, suggesting enhanced targeting capabilities. The magazine appears to be a detachable box type, partially visible beneath the receiver. The overall construction suggests a blend of metal and polymer materials, giving it a modern, tactical look suitable for urban environments.
description: A futuristic, angular rifle with a skeletonized stock, teal and gray body, yellow accents, and a mounted scope. Features a long barrel, detachable box magazine, and a compact muzzle device.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the narrow profile of the barrel and the alignment of the scope and stock.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the skeletonized stock, detailed receiver, yellow accents, and the full length of the barrel and scope.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the slim stock and grip, with the barrel and muzzle device barely visible.
description_view_3: The right side view highlights the angular design, magazine placement, and the structure of the stock and fore-end.
